meta.title: Luiz Cristino — Full Stack & Mobile Developer
meta.description: Full Stack and Mobile Developer at Underwork. Specializing in Flutter, React, Kotlin, Laravel and Node.js. Programming since 2000.
meta.keywords: Luiz Cristino, Full Stack Developer, Mobile Developer, Flutter, React, Kotlin, Laravel, Node.js, Android, TypeScript, Brazil

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I've been programming since 2000, starting purely as a hobby. Some early pet projects:
pet_projects: Own OTS (Open Tibia Server) with custom spells in Lua
A file batch renamer using regex
A DotA champion lore app in Java
about.current: Currently at Underwork, focused on Web and hybrid mobile apps — mostly React Native and Flutter. Fell in love with Android since Froyo and that knowledge proved invaluable when bridging native Android and React Native.
about.next: Next goal: a Master's Degree in AI. Always fascinated by it — currently self-taught in the area.
about.community_intro: Proud Arctic Code Vault Contributor — code I wrote is preserved for 1,000+ years in Svalbard, Norway. I've contributed to several popular open-source projects and believe in giving back to the ecosystem that shaped my career.

community_items.name: React Native
community_items.desc: Contributed to Facebook's cross-platform mobile framework

community_items.name: Chakra UI
community_items.desc: Contributed to the popular accessible React component library

community_items.name: React Native Maps
community_items.desc: Contributed to the de-facto maps library for RN apps

community_items.name: Laravel Modules
community_items.desc: Contributed to nWidart's modular architecture package for Laravel

community_items.name: node-osc
community_items.desc: Contributed to the Open Sound Control protocol implementation for Node.js

kotlin.title: Kotlin
kotlin.desc: My Android journey started with Froyo and Java, but Kotlin changed everything. Its expressiveness, null-safety, coroutines, and extension functions make Android development genuinely enjoyable. It's the language I reach for when I want code that reads like intention.

laravel.title: Laravel & Filament
laravel.desc: Laravel is what made me fall back in love with PHP. I've been a heavy contributor to the ecosystem — including packages in the modular architecture space — and rely on Filament for building complex admin panels and CRUD-heavy dashboards with elegant, maintainable code. The broader ecosystem (Forge, Vapor, Horizon) lets me ship production-grade backends fast, and I maintain a personal starter template with event-driven architecture baked in.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Open to discussing new projects and opportunities — reach out anytime.
